stories.title: Create RoleContext and useRole hook
stories.notes: RoleContext + useRole. Demo=admin, stub=requestor. Permissions derived from role.

stories.title: Conditional sidebar navigation by role
stories.notes: NavGroups/items filtered by permKey. Hidden items removed from DOM.

stories.title: Route-level access guards
stories.notes: canAccessRoute in route-guard.ts. useEffect in app.tsx redirects + toast.

stories.title: Role indicator in header
stories.notes: Badge in header with role-specific colors.

stories.title: Role switching in demo mode
stories.notes: Segmented control in DemoBanner. Switches role immediately, updates sidebar + permissions.
